testcase.name: test_health_ok

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ReadTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='e6552582-d196-4ac4-9914-1dd5e5515330.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=15)
